title: m6A methylation of circKPNA2 promotes colorectal carcinogenesis by activating the RIN1-Ras pathway.
snippet: Colorectal cancer (CRC) is a prevalent and highly lethal malignancy. However, the molecular mechanisms underlying its progression remain incompletely understood. Therefore, this study aimed to investigate the role and mechanisms of circKPNA2 in CRC progression. We used various techniques, including RNA sequencing, functional assays, RNA pull-down, and mass....
